name: Fighting
description: One-on-one combat with precise inputs, combos, and competitive balance

mechanics.coreLoop: Choose fighter → Master moveset → Execute combos and special moves → Win rounds → Unlock characters and stages → Improve in competitive play
playerActions: Execute basic attacks (light, medium, heavy punches/kicks)
Perform special moves with directional inputs + buttons
Chain attacks into combos for maximum damage
Block, parry, or dodge opponent attacks
Break throws and counter opponent's moves
Manage super meter for powerful ultimate attacks
Read opponent patterns and adapt strategy
Execute frame-perfect inputs for advanced techniques

mechanics: Unlock new fighters through story mode or currency
Unlock alternate costumes and color palettes
Online ranking system (Bronze → Silver → Gold → Platinum → Master)
Single-player arcade mode with increasing difficulty
Training mode to master combos and setups

winConditions: Deplete opponent's health bar before yours
Complete story mode with all characters
failConditions: Can immediately rematch or continue story
Rank down in competitive modes after losses

resourceSystems.name: Health Bar
resourceSystems.mechanics: Depletes from taking damage, does not regenerate during round

resourceSystems.name: Super/EX Meter
resourceSystems.mechanics: Builds from dealing/taking damage, spent on enhanced moves or supers

resourceSystems.name: In-game Currency
resourceSystems.mechanics: Earned from matches, spent on unlockables

resourceSystems.name: Frame Advantage
resourceSystems.mechanics: Invisible resource - better positioning after moves creates offensive opportunities

setting.era: Contemporary or fantastical (depending on game universe)
setting.location: Global tournament stages, from dojos to cityscapes to otherworldly arenas
setting.worldType: Martial arts tournament setting with diverse character backgrounds

protagonist.background: Martial artist seeking to prove their fighting style, avenge past defeat, or win tournament
protagonist.motivation: Become world champion, master their art, seek revenge, protect loved ones, or gain ultimate power
abilities: Master of unique fighting style (karate, kung fu, wrestling, supernatural powers)
Signature special moves and ultimate techniques
Ability to learn and adapt mid-fight

conflict.primary: Global martial arts tournament where the world's strongest fighters compete for ultimate glory
secondary: Criminal organizations using tournament as cover
Supernatural forces seeking to corrupt or destroy
Generational conflicts (student vs master, old vs new style)
National pride and representing one's country/school

worldRules.physics: Enhanced human abilities with anime/comic book physics for dramatic effects
worldRules.magic: Ki/chi energy allows superhuman feats and energy projectiles
worldRules.technology: Modern world with cyborgs and advanced fighters occasionally integrated

difficulty: Very high skill ceiling with execution barriers
targetAudience: Competitive players seeking deep mechanical mastery
